title: Wow experience hackathon updates!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community, today our developers are hard at work on an experience hackathon, throughout the day we will be sharing updates on this thread about the features, updates, and progress our team is making! As we hit the halfway mark of our hackathon, we are almost at 400 solved issues! You are also able to follow along with our LIVE dashboard via zoom.

Some of the accomplishments so far:

  • We worked on over 20+ mobile updates, including adding the option to search views

  • Archive search capability is more accessible

  • clearer sign-up flow for new users

  • We worked on all the pieces of text that were hidden, cropped covered

  • Added search to the connect boards disconnect

Here is an image of the team! Stay tuned for more updates!
